close_reason: Reworked TopologyPhase (removed storage unlocking, added materializer/shard_layout to TSL) and LockingPhase (only extracts log service IDs)
description:
Update phases to remove storage_teams handling:

TopologyPhase (lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/topology_phase.ex):
- Remove storage_teams validation and unlocking
- Add metadata_materializer to services map
- Include shard_layout in TSL construction
- Set storage_teams: [] for backward compatibility

LockingPhase (lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/locking_phase.ex):
- Remove storage service extraction from extract_old_system_services/2
- Only extract log service IDs from old layout
title: Rework TopologyPhase and LockingPhase
